mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fridge_item WHERE member_id=#{id} ORDER BY expire_date
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fridge_item(ingredient_name, quantity, expire_date, created_date, freezer, member_id) VALUES
(#{item.ingredient_name}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.expire_date}, now(), #{item.freezer}, #{item.member_id})
mapper.update: UPDATE fridge_item SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE fridge_id=#{firdge_id}
